name: Instil Bio, Inc.
summary: Part I . Overview We are a biotechnology company focused on identifying and advancing innovative therapeutic opportunities. In January 2026 we announced our wholly owned subsidiary, Axion Bio, Inc., or Axion Bio, was discontinuing development of our former lead product candidate, AXN-2510, a bispecific antibody targeting both programmed death-ligand 1 and the family of vascular endothelial growth factors in solid tumor cancers.
